description: Will, probably. In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100-1138 CE). In which Sayyid al-Kull disposes of his possessions (including a drug store, dukkān ʿiṭr, ḥawāʾij, ʿudda, māʿūn), giving some to his two sisters, one of whom is named ʿAduwwa. And possibly also his brother and his wife. (Information from Goitein's index card.) Might be the same Sayyid al-Kull as in Bodl. MS heb. d 66/112 + T-S 6J1.18.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
